nodes.name: Welcome Email

parameters.message:
=Dear {{$node["Attendee Registrations"].json["Great, can we get your full name?"]}},

Welcome to n8nConf, the world's largest no-code automation conference!

This email is to confirm your registration to the following sessions:
- {{$node["Attendee Registrations"].json["Which sessions would you like to attend?"].join('\n- ')}}

You should receive Google Calendar invites to these events on your email. Please consult those for the Google Meet joining information.

You can also interact with the rest of the community via our Mattermost chat. We created an account just for you!
Look for the channel corresponding to your session to join the discussion!

Login URL: {{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }}
Username: {{$node["Create Account"].json["username"]}}
Password: {{$node["Create Account"].parameter["password"]}}

Remember to change your password immediately after your first login!

If you have any troubles with joining the event, or using the chat rooms; please feel free to let us know on support@n8nconf.com

We look forward to your participation!

Best,
Team n8n

parameters.subject: Welcome to n8nConf

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: google Sheets  O Auth2  A P I details
google Calendar  O Auth2  A P I details
configurationSteps: Verify the settings of the trigger node "Attendee Registrations".
Open the "Add to Sheets" Google Sheets node.
Ensure you select the spreadsheet file and specific tab/sheet from the dropdown menus.
Map the input JSON keys to your target sheet columns.
Open the "Create Account" node (n8n-nodes-base.mattermost) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Add to team" node (n8n-nodes-base.mattermost) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Array to Rows" node (n8n-nodes-base.function) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Get Session Details" Google Sheets node.
Ensure you select the spreadsheet file and specific tab/sheet from the dropdown menus.
Map the input JSON keys to your target sheet columns.
Open the "Merge Data" node (n8n-nodes-base.merge) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Add to channels" node (n8n-nodes-base.mattermost) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Add to Event" node (n8n-nodes-base.googleCalendar) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Welcome Email" node (n8n-nodes-base.gmail) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Error Handler" node (n8n-nodes-base.stopAndError) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
No global variables node (Set node) is present. If you need dynamic constants, add a Set node after the trigger.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Incoming triggers will qualified/formatted, new rows will be written to Google Sheets, and email replies or alerts will be sent automatically.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
